sections.heading: Newly Diagnosed Circumscribed Glioma (WHO Grade 1)
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "circumscribed_glioma_gr1", "title": "Newly Diagnosed Circumscribed Glioma (WHO Grade 1)", "branching_basis": ["Tumor location and resectability", "Patient age and symptoms"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Maximal safe resection feasible", "options": [{"type": "Surgery", "label": "Gross total resection", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "If gross total resection, observation. If incomplete resection or biopsy, consider observation or radiation therapy for symptomatic/progressive disease. Consider BRAF/MEK inhibitors for BRAF-altered tumors [GLIO-1]."}}]}

sections.heading: Newly Diagnosed Oligodendroglioma, WHO Grade 2 (IDH-mutant, 1p19q codeleted)
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "oligodendroglioma_grade2", "title": "Newly Diagnosed Oligodendroglioma, WHO Grade 2 (IDH-mutant, 1p19q codeleted)", "branching_basis": ["Performance status (KPS)", "Residual disease status", "Patient preference for upfront treatment"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Good PS (KPS ≥60), no residual/measurable disease after surgery", "options": [{"type": "Observation", "label": "Observation with serial MRI", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "Systemic_therapy", "label": "IDH inhibitor (vorasidenib or ivosidenib)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1 for residual disease", "linked_regimen_ids": ["vorasidenib", "ivosidenib"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Observation is reasonable. IDH inhibitor may be considered to delay need for RT/chemotherapy [GLIO-2, GLIO-2A footnote m,n]."}}, {"criteria": "Good PS (KPS ≥60), residual/measurable disease or upfront RT/chemo preferred", "options": [{"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "RT + adjuvant PCV (category 1)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["PCV"]}, {"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "RT + adjuvant temozolomide", "preference": "Other Recommended", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide"]}, {"type": "Systemic_therapy", "label": "IDH inhibitor", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["vorasidenib", "ivosidenib"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "RT + adjuvant PCV is preferred based on RTOG 9802 results [GLIO-2A]."}}, {"criteria": "Poor PS (KPS <60)", "options": [{"type": "Systemic_therapy", "label": "IDH inhibitor", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["vorasidenib", "ivosidenib"]}, {"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "Hypofractionated RT ± temozolomide", "preference": "Other Recommended", "recommendation": "Category 2A", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Treatment choice depends on cause of poor PS. If due to tumor, RT+TMZ may be preferred; if due to comorbidities, IDH inhibitor may be better tolerated [GLIO-2A footnote p]."}}]}

sections.heading: Newly Diagnosed Glioblastoma, IDH-wild-type, WHO Grade 4
sections.content: {"pathway_id": "glioblastoma_idhwt", "title": "Newly Diagnosed Glioblastoma, IDH-wild-type, WHO Grade 4", "branching_basis": ["Age", "Performance status (KPS)", "MGMT promoter methylation status"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Age ≤70, good PS (KPS ≥70), MGMT methylated or unmethylated", "options": [{"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "RT + concurrent temozolomide and adjuvant temozolomide + TTF (preferred)", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide", "TTF"]}, {"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "RT + concurrent and adjuvant temozolomide", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide"]}, {"type": "Clinical_trial", "label": "Clinical trial", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Stupp protocol with TTF preferred. Clinical trial preferred [GLIO-10]."}}, {"criteria": "Age >70, good PS (KPS ≥70), MGMT methylated", "options": [{"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "Hypofractionated RT + concurrent and adjuvant temozolomide", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide"]}, {"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "Standard RT + concurrent and adjuvant temozolomide + TTF", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide", "TTF"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Hypofractionated RT/TEM is standard. Consider TTF if good PS [GLIO-11]."}}, {"criteria": "Age >70, good PS (KPS ≥70), MGMT unmethylated or indeterminate", "options": [{"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "Hypofractionated RT + concurrent and adjuvant temozolomide", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide"]}, {"type": "Radiation_therapy", "label": "Standard RT + concurrent and adjuvant temozolomide + TTF", "preference": "Preferred", "recommendation": "Category 1", "linked_regimen_ids": ["temozolomide", "TTF"]}]}]}
